# Fisique Fitness - Complete Information

> Premium personal training gym in Kokapet, Hyderabad offering 1:1 coaching, nutrition guidance, and sauna recovery.

## About Fisique Fitness

Fisique Fitness is Kokapet's premier personal training studio, designed for busy professionals who want real results without the crowded gym experience. Located on the 4th Floor, Above Pulla Reddy Sweets in Avant Cedar, we offer a serene boutique environment away from the noise.

What sets us apart:
- **Personalized Attention**: Unlike commercial gyms with hundreds of members, we maintain a boutique environment to ensure every client receives one-on-one coaching from certified trainers.
- **Holistic Approach**: We combine customized training programs with nutrition guidance and sauna recovery for comprehensive wellness.
- **Results-Driven**: Our signature 90-day transformation programs deliver visible, sustainable results.

## Services

### Personal Training (Primary Focus)
Our specialty is 1:1 personal training with certified coaches. Each package includes:
- Personalized workout programs tailored to your goals
- Nutrition guidance and customized meal planning
- Progress tracking with regular body composition analysis
- Sauna recovery sessions for muscle repair
- Flexible scheduling for busy professionals

**90-Day Transformation Program**:
- Days 1-30 (Foundation): Build proper form, establish habits, start nutrition changes
- Days 31-60 (Progression): Increase intensity, refine nutrition, build momentum
- Days 61-90 (Transformation): Peak performance, visible results, sustainable habits

### Gym Membership
Premium equipment access in a boutique, uncrowded environment:
- 1-month, 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month plans available
- Full access to strength training and cardio equipment
- Boutique environment ensures you never wait for equipment
- Sauna access available as add-on
- Can be upgraded to include personal training anytime

### Sauna Recovery
On-site sauna exclusively for members:
- Aids muscle recovery after workouts
- Reduces stress and improves circulation
- Enhances overall wellness
- Included with personal training packages or available as add-on

### Nutrition Counseling
Personalized diet guidance included with all PT packages:
- Customized meal plans based on your lifestyle and preferences
- Focus on sustainable nutrition, not extreme dieting
- Weekly check-ins and adjustments
- Support for fat loss, muscle gain, or improved energy goals

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What makes Fisique different from other gyms in Kokapet?**
A: Fisique Fitness offers premium 1-on-1 personal training with certified coaches, an on-site sauna for recovery, customized nutrition plans, and a boutique atmosphere with limited membership for personalized attention. We're Kokapet's only truly holistic fitness studio.

**Q: Do you offer personal training in Kokapet?**
A: Yes! Personal training is our specialty. Our certified trainers create customized 90-day transformation programs that include strength training, mobility work, nutrition guidance, and sauna recovery sessions.

**Q: What are your gym membership options?**
A: We offer flexible membership plans: 1-month, 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month options. All memberships include access to premium equipment and facilities. Personal training packages and sauna access can be added to any membership.

**Q: Does Fisique Fitness have a sauna?**
A: Yes! We have an on-site sauna exclusively for our members. Sauna therapy aids muscle recovery, reduces stress, improves circulation, and enhances overall wellness.

**Q: Where is Fisique Fitness located in Kokapet?**
A: We're located at 4th Floor, Above Pulla Reddy Sweets, Avant Cedar, Kokapet, Hyderabad. We're easily accessible from Financial District, Narsingi, and Gandipet areas with ample parking available.

**Q: Can I bring my own personal trainer to Fisique?**
A: Yes, freelance trainers and physiotherapists are welcome to train their clients at Fisique. We offer trainer access passes. Contact us on WhatsApp at +91-9515469444 for options and pricing.

**Q: Do you offer nutrition counseling?**
A: Absolutely! All our personal training packages include personalized diet counseling. Our trainers work with you to create sustainable nutrition plans that complement your training goals.

**Q: What are your operating hours?**
A: Fisique Fitness is open Monday to Saturday from 5:30 AM to 10:00 PM. We offer flexible scheduling for personal training sessions.

**Q: Can I try a session before committing?**
A: Yes! We offer a free consultation and trial session so you can experience our training approach firsthand. Contact us at +91-9515469444 to book.

**Q: Is Fisique crowded like other gyms?**
A: No! We maintain a boutique, uncrowded experience. You'll never have to wait for equipment.

- Monday: 5:30 AM - 10:00 PM
- Tuesday: 5:30 AM - 10:00 PM
- Wednesday: 5:30 AM - 10:00 PM
- Thursday: 5:30 AM - 10:00 PM
- Friday: 5:30 AM - 10:00 PM
- Saturday: 5:30 AM - 10:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Location Context
Kokapet is a rapidly developing residential and commercial area in Hyderabad, adjacent to the Financial District. Fisique Fitness serves professionals and residents from:
- Kokapet
- Financial District / Gachibowli
- Narsingi
- Gandipet
- Khajaguda
- Nanakramguda

## Website Structure

### Main Pages
- **Homepage** (https://fisique.fitness/): Overview of services, reviews, FAQs
- **Kokapet Gym** (https://fisique.fitness/kokapet-gym): Location-specific landing page
- **Personal Training** (https://fisique.fitness/personal-training-kokapet): PT services and 90-day programs
- **Gym Membership** (https://fisique.fitness/gym-membership-kokapet): Membership plans and pricing inquiry
- **Blog** (https://fisique.fitness/blog-posts/): Fitness tips, guides, and articles
- **Contact** (https://fisique.fitness/embrace-your-strength-at-fisique-fitness-contact-us-to-start-your-journey/): Contact form and location

### Location Pages
- **Gym Near Narsingi** (https://fisique.fitness/gym-narsingi): 3 min from Narsingi
- **Gym Near Financial District** (https://fisique.fitness/gym-financial-district): 5 min from FD
- **Gym Near Gachibowli** (https://fisique.fitness/gym-gachibowli): 8 min from Gachibowli
- **Gym Near Gandipet** (https://fisique.fitness/gym-gandipet): 7 min from Gandipet
- **Gym Near Manikonda** (https://fisique.fitness/gym-manikonda): 10 min from Manikonda
- **Gym Near Puppalaguda** (https://fisique.fitness/gym-puppalaguda): 6 min from Puppalaguda
- **Gym Near Tellapur** (https://fisique.fitness/gym-tellapur): 12 min from Tellapur

### Related Subdomains
- **Offers** (https://offers.fisique.fitness): Current promotions and special offers
- **Member Portal** (https://member.fisique.fitness): Member login and account management

## Brand Values
- **Personalization**: Every program is tailored to individual goals
- **Quality over Quantity**: Limited membership for premium experience
- **Holistic Wellness**: Training + Nutrition + Recovery
- **Professional Focus**: Designed for busy professionals
- **Results-Driven**: Measurable transformations in 90 days
